title: Weekly Operating Review
summary: CEO operating review — confirmed marketing activation (Option A), answered CFO data gaps, introduced decision-deadline process for blockers, set April 26 reassessment criteria
contextSummary: Week 2 of planning-complete/execution-empty phase. All diagnostics excellent. Marketing activating this week. Sprint plan starts Monday with OB-2. April 26 is the hard checkpoint for 50K MAU target viability.
